---
name: RBAC & route protection
about: ADMIN / ACCOUNTANT / USER permissions and UI/API alignment
title: "[RBAC] "
assignees: []
---

## Scope
- Server-side enforcement for role on each protected route.
- Frontend: hide or disable actions the role cannot perform.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] USER cannot access admin-only endpoints (403 / consistent JSON).
- [ ] Accountant vs admin rules match SDD.
- [ ] Screenshots possible for Task 4 (one role vs another).
